title: D2.2 Network application layer software
author: Claus Pribbernow
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This deliverable presents the network communication and 
synchronization between the BSN components. The 
documentation will cover two software implementation of a 
network communication and outline the link layer and 
protocol layer implementation. The SPINAL protocol as a 
packet based protocol implemented in Zephyr RTOS with 
threads and scheduler, and the BSN_SPI protocol, as a time 
division multiplexing method with a deterministic 
transmission delays.
